common_nutrition_considerations: Calorie control; large-breed growth Ca:P balance in puppies
common_health_predispositions: Obesity (POMC gene), hip/elbow dysplasia, exercise-induced collapse
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calcium/phosphorus ratio (puppy); calorie density; omega-3 (joint)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Monitor body condition; avoid free-feeding
preferred_food_traits: Large-breed growth formula as puppy; weight-management adult
notes: Breed-aware only. Body condition + activity drive the plan, not breed alone.

common_nutrition_considerations: Large-breed growth control; digestive sensitivity common
common_health_predispositions: Hip/elbow dysplasia, EPI, degenerative myelopathy, bloat (GDV)
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Digestibility; fiber; omega-3; appropriate Ca for growth
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Monitor for EPI signs; discuss bloat-risk feeding (meal size)
caution_flags: GDV risk -> avoid single large meals
notes: Discuss EPI testing if chronic loose stool/weight loss.

common_health_predispositions: Obesity, hip dysplasia, certain cancers, atopy/allergies
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Omega-3; calorie density; antioxidants
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Monitor weight; allergy work-up if skin/GI signs
preferred_food_traits: Large-breed adult; novel protein if allergy-prone
notes: Allergy diets should be vet-supervised elimination trials.

common_health_predispositions: Brachycephalic airway syndrome, allergies, IVDD, dermatitis
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; kibble size/shape; omega-3
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Avoid obesity (airway load); monitor skin/GI
preferred_food_traits: Weight-control; easy-to-pick kibble shape; LID if allergic
notes: Weight control is central for brachycephalic breathing.

common_health_predispositions: BOAS, dermatitis/skin folds, allergies, joint issues
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; omega-3; skin-support nutrients
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Keep lean; monitor skin
notes: Breed-aware only.

common_health_predispositions: Bloat (standard), Addison's, hip dysplasia, dental disease (toy)
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; dental kibble; appropriate meal size
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Toy: dental + calorie density; Standard: GDV-aware feeding
notes: Plan varies sharply by size variety.

common_health_predispositions: IVDD, obesity, dental disease
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; weight control
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Keep very lean to reduce IVDD load; dental
notes: Lean body condition is protective for the spine.

common_nutrition_considerations: Calorie density; dental; hypoglycemia risk in puppies
common_health_predispositions: Dental disease, hypoglycemia (puppy), portosystemic shunt, tracheal collapse
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; small kibble; protein (if shunt, vet-led)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Puppy: avoid prolonged fasting; dental care
caution_flags: Shunt -> protein managed by vet only
notes: Toy-breed energy needs are high per kg.

common_health_predispositions: Dental disease, hypoglycemia, patellar luxation, heart disease (senior)
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; dental support; taurine (if cardiac, vet-led)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Avoid obesity; dental care
caution_flags: Hypoglycemia in puppies -> frequent small meals
notes: Breed-aware only.

common_health_predispositions: Boxer cardiomyopathy (ARVC), DCM, cancers, hip dysplasia
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Taurine/carnitine ONLY if vet-directed; omega-3
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Discuss diet+DCM cautiously; avoid overclaiming grain-free link
notes: DCM diet link unproven; do not advise grain-free avoidance as fact - defer to vet.

common_health_predispositions: GDV/bloat, hip dysplasia, DCM, growth disorders
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calcium/phosphorus + energy control in growth; meal size
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Giant-breed puppy formula essential; GDV-aware feeding
caution_flags: Over-supplementation of calcium harmful in growth
notes: Growth-formula calcium control is critical for giant breeds.

common_health_predispositions: Pancreatitis, hyperlipidemia, bladder stones (struvite/urate)
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Fat level (low-fat if pancreatitis-prone, vet-led); urinary mineral balance
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Avoid high-fat treats/table scraps; monitor lipids
preferred_food_traits: Low-fat formula ONLY with vet guidance
notes: Low-fat diets should be vet-directed, not assumed.

common_health_predispositions: Brachycephalic, dental disease, allergies, eye issues
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; kibble shape; omega-3
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Keep lean; dental care
notes: Breed-aware only.

common_health_predispositions: Obesity, epilepsy, hypothyroidism, ear infections
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie control; fiber for satiety
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Strict portion control; avoid scavenging
notes: Portion discipline matters most.

common_health_predispositions: Obesity, FLUTD, diabetes, CKD (senior), dental
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Protein; moisture (wet food); urinary mineral balance; phosphorus (senior/CKD)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Encourage wet food for hydration; weight control
caution_flags: CKD -> vet-led renal diet only if diagnosed
notes: Most common cat; plan by body condition + conditions.

common_health_predispositions: HCM, hip dysplasia, obesity, SMA
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; taurine (always essential for cats); omega-3
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Monitor weight; cardiac history -> vet-led
notes: Taurine is essential in ALL cat diets.

common_health_predispositions: PKD, brachycephalic, dental, hairballs
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Kibble shape; fiber (hairball); phosphorus (if PKD/CKD, vet-led)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Easy-to-eat kibble; monitor kidneys
notes: Kibble shape aids brachycephalic cats.

common_health_predispositions: Asthma, dental, amyloidosis, some GI sensitivities
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Protein; calorie density matched to activity
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Monitor weight (can be lean); dental
notes: Breed-aware only.

common_health_predispositions: HCM, skin conditions, higher metabolic demand
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; protein; omega-3 (skin)
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Higher intake may be normal; monitor heart
notes: May need more calories than typical cats.

common_health_predispositions: HCM, obesity, FLUTD, bladder stones
nutrients_to_discuss_with_vet: Calorie density; urinary mineral balance; taurine
avoid_or_monitor_notes: Weight control; urinary-aware
notes: Breed-aware only.
